briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their supposedly AI-powered shopping app was revealed to be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings following the bankruptcy of fintech middleware firm Synapse, highlighting serious risks in the BaaS model.

- **[Fintech is making credit cards weirder](https://workweek.com/2022/08/05/fintech-is-making-credit-cards-weirder/)** — *Hacker News* — Fintech innovation is pushing credit cards into new territory with novel rewards structures, spend controls, and embedded finance features.

- **[Apple acquires UK open banking startup Credit Kudos](https://ffnews.com/newsarticle/apple-acquires-uk-open-banking-startup-credit-kudos/)** — *Hacker News* — Apple has acquired UK-based open banking startup Credit Kudos, signalling the tech giant's deepening interest in financial data and lending.

- **[One in 7 shops in UK has turned cashless in the past year, survey finds](https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cm211jnz568o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss)** — *BBC Business* — A new survey finds 14% of UK small High Street retailers have gone card-only in the past year, accelerating the shift away from cash payments.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[CVCA and NACO offer competing visions for feds' $750-million venture envelope](https://betakit.com/cvca-and-naco-offer-competing-visions-for-feds-750-million-venture-envelope/)** — *BetaKit* — Canada's two leading venture capital associations are presenting different strategies to the federal government on how to deploy a $750-million venture funding envelope, with implications for fintech and tech startups nationwide.

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — Canada's federal government flagged screen scraping as a security risk and set an open banking implementation target, a framework still being built out with relevance to today's Canadian financial ecosystem.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A detailed analysis of how open banking frameworks are reshaping payments competition, directly relevant to Canada's ongoing open banking rollout.

- **[Kraken dives deeper into defence with $615-million Covelya Group acquisition](https://betakit.com/kraken-dives-deeper-into-defence-with-615-million-covelya-group-acquisition/)** — *BetaKit* — Atlantic Canadian tech firm Kraken Robotics has completed a $615-million acquisition of the Covelya Group, marking a major milestone for the region's tech sector.

- **[Trump wants AI data centres to bring their own power. Alberta's been doing that from the get-go](https://www.cbc.ca/news/canada/calgary/data-centre-buildout-alberta-us-9.7111850?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Alberta's deregulated energy market has made it a natural fit for self-powered AI data centres, a model now gaining attention as digital infrastructure investment accelerates across North America.

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[Kraken dives deeper into defence with $615-million Covelya Group acquisition](https://betakit.com/kraken-dives-deeper-into-defence-with-615-million-covelya-group-acquisition/)** — *BetaKit* — St. John's-based Kraken Robotics' landmark $615-million acquisition of Covelya Group is a powerful signal of Atlantic Canada's growing capacity to produce globally competitive, high-growth tech companies.

- **[CVCA and NACO offer competing visions for feds' $750-million venture envelope](https://betakit.com/cvca-and-naco-offer-competing-visions-for-feds-750-million-venture-envelope/)** — *BetaKit* — How Ottawa deploys this $750-million venture envelope could meaningfully impact access to growth capital for Atlantic Canadian fintech startups, making this debate one to watch closely.

- **[Prediction market bets on Iran strikes spur allegations of insider trading](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/prediction-market-bets-iran-strikes-insider-trading-allegations-9.7112463?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Allegations of insider trading on prediction markets raise important questions about financial regulation and market integrity in an era of decentralized, app-based financial platforms.
